caption: The video depicts a panel discussion taking place in a conference room. Three individuals, two men and one woman, are standing behind small round tables equipped with microphones and water bottles. The woman, positioned in the center, appears to be speaking, gesturing with her hands as she addresses the audience. The man on the left listens attentively, while the man on the right leans slightly forward, also engaged in the conversation. The setting includes rows of empty chairs facing the panelists, suggesting that the audience is not present in the frame. A banner in the background displays text related to science, practice, and healthcare, indicating the theme of the discussion. The overall atmosphere suggests a formal yet interactive session aimed at sharing insights or expertise on a specific topic.
